title: agropyron elongatum
intro: Agropyron elongatum, also known as slender wheat grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Agropyron elongatum include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Agropyron elongatum can be prepared as a herbal tea or powder supplement, and it is often consumed fresh or dried to take advantage of its numerous health benefits.
